papers.title: Random Search for Hyper-Parameter Optimization
papers.abstract: This paper shows empirically and theoretically that randomly chosen trials are more efficient for hyper-parameter optimization than trials on a grid.

papers.title: Practical Bayesian Optimization of Machine Learning Algorithms
papers.abstract: Bayesian optimization with Gaussian processes to efficiently explore the hyperparameter space of ML algorithms.

papers.title: Efficient and Robust Automated Machine Learning (Auto-sklearn)
papers.abstract: Auto-sklearn: an automated ML toolkit leveraging Bayesian optimization and meta-learning to free users from selecting algorithms and hyperparameters.

papers.title: Neural Architecture Search with Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Uses a recurrent network to generate model descriptions and trains with RL to maximize validation accuracy.

papers.title: Efficient Neural Architecture Search via Parameter Sharing (ENAS)
papers.abstract: Forces all child models to share parameters, making NAS 1000x cheaper than original NAS.

papers.title: DARTS: Differentiable Architecture Search
papers.abstract: Continuous relaxation of architecture representation enabling efficient gradient-based NAS. Reduces search time from thousands of GPU days to one.

papers.title: Regularized Evolution for Image Classifier Architecture Search
papers.abstract: Aging evolution outperforms RL and random search for NAS on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet.

papers.title: AutoML: A Survey of the State-of-the-Art
papers.abstract: Comprehensive survey covering HPO, NAS, and automated feature engineering.

_note: Hand-curated foundational AutoML papers with approximate citation counts
